markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy for 2026, prioritizing high-ROI templates.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The strategy will shift from guides to templates, which drove 102 purchases in Dec vs. 59 for guides. The immediate plan is to ramp up guides while GrowthX develops a scalable template production proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**New Template Focus:** GrowthX will propose a new template category: "mini apps" (e.g., PDF converters). These are easy to build, have high viral potential, and align with the long-term marketplace vision.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Performance & LTV:** Using a $250 placeholder LTV (6-month profit), December's templates generated \~$25.5k in value. Lovable is closing the competitive gap with Replit (29% vs. 34% share).](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**Internal Alignment:** Sam and Johanna will sync with Sebastian to align on the new template strategy, as Sebastian is also working on non-website templates.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Topics

### Performance Analysis (Nov–Dec)

  - [**Conversion Data:** Templates are the primary conversion driver.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [**Templates:** 102 purchases](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Guides:** 59 purchases](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape (via Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [**Replit:** Closest competitor, with a 34% share vs. Lovable's 29% (gap is closing).](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**Base44:** A strong competitor due to its paid marketing push.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [**LTV Placeholder:** Use $250/purchase as a temporary LTV for ROI calculations.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Represents the 6-month profit target, a benchmark comparable to paid marketing CAC.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Traffic:** A regex formula now filters out hundreds of Lovable misspellings, improving data accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

### New Template Strategy & Scaling

  - [**Problem:** The current template production process is not scalable enough to meet demand.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX is developing scalable production workflows with its engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Track 1 (Websites):** Continue producing high-quality, SEO-optimized website templates.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Track 2 (Mini Apps):** Launch a new category of simple, viral tools (e.g., PDF converters, QR scanners).](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Easy to build, high viral potential, and align with the long-term marketplace vision.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Timeline:** GrowthX will present a detailed timeline and proposal by the end of the week.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [**Immediate Plan:** Ramp up guide publishing to 2/day this week, as this is the fastest way to increase content velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [**Long-Term Plan:** Shift focus and budget from guides to templates once the scalable production process is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**Topic Ownership:** Johanna is drafting a list of key topics for Lovable to own, including "vibe coding."](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sam:** Confirm finance approval for the guides ramp-up.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Sam & Johanna:** Sync with Sebastian on the new template strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Johanna:** Finalize and share the list of key topic areas.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Present the scalable template production timeline and proposal by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Analyze Scrunch data to identify prompts where Replit outperforms Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/sUxVyx4BMTFUq6kw6SnNyC3M59GNgWyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
